prompt: A high-altitude alpine panorama with snow-capped mountain peaks, green valleys, a turquoise glacial lake in the distance, and a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. Strong sunlight illuminates the mountain range. Below at lower altitude, alpine meadows with wildflowers, scattered chalets with wooden roofs, and a winding mountain road with hairpin turns become visible. To the left, a steep rocky ridgeline with patches of snow leads down to a forested valley with a small village. To the right, a glacier tongue extends between two peaks above a moraine field. First-person viewer as a paraglider pilot, with the colorful red-orange-blue striped paraglider canopy and suspension lines visible above, and the pilot's legs and harness visible at the bottom of the frame. First-person view from the paraglider harness, looking forward and slightly downward over the alpine landscape, with the canopy edge framing the top of the view.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A high-altitude alpine panorama with snow-capped mountain peaks, green valleys, a turquoise glacial lake in the distance, and a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. Strong sunlight illuminates the mountain range.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Below at lower altitude, there are alpine meadows with wildflowers, scattered chalets with wooden roofs, and a winding mountain road with hairpin turns. To the left, a steep rocky ridgeline with patches of snow leads down to a forested valley with a small village. To the right, a glacier tongue extends between two peaks above a moraine field.
